title: Add an initial "inspect" command
body: Add an "inspect" command, which can be used to dump the contents of the Buildah object for a working container.  This'll make it easier to write integration tests that need to look at a container while we're working on it.

comments.body: The format of the manifest (which skopeo displays directly in `--raw` mode) and configurations will vary, but I suppose we could build up a Buildah object using the configuration and display that.

![](https://github.trello.services/images/mini-trello-icon.png) [(3) [buildah] Add a way to inspect working containers](https://trello.com/c/g5hLYG4M/501-3-buildah-add-a-way-to-inspect-working-containers)
Inspecting of images (or rather, the builder configuration which we'd start with for a given image) should be working now.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/76395efa52a2344bfdf47b13c92610225b16edf1.1495193655441155840/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing 76395efa52a2344bfdf47b13c92610225b16edf1 to master...
